title: Case 102: Bullets Made Metal Sounds on Impact
description: Fifteen entities surrounded a Kentucky farmhouse in 1955. Shotgun blasts bounced off them like they were made of steel. Subscribe to the Department archive.

youtube_metadata.shorts_title: Case 102: Bullets Made Metal Sounds on Impact...
youtube_metadata.shorts_caption: Department surveillance footage from Christian County, Kentucky. Fifteen entities withstood point-blank shotgun fire. The bullets made metallic pinging sounds. Subscribe for classified case files.

tiktok_metadata.video_caption: They shot it point-blank. The bullet made a metallic ping and bounced right off. Fifteen of these things surrounded a Kentucky farmhouse in 1955 #horror #paranormal #unexplained #alien #scary

instagram_metadata.reels_caption: What kind of creature can withstand point-blank shotgun fire? In 1955, fifteen entities surrounded a Kentucky farmhouse. The bullets bounced off with metallic pings. #horror #paranormal #unexplained #truecrime #scary #alien #kentucky
